title: El marido de mi novia
writer: Alejandro Ciangherotti, José Giaccardi, Antonio Monsell
actors: María Elena Marqués, Abel Salazar, Luis Beristáin
plot: Paco and Raquel are a couple of pickpockets that began to work together, as they begin to know each other, their stories and the reason they became thiefs starts to appear. A melodramatic comedy with a tint of noir.
